name: New Orleans Pizza
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Cooked andouille sausage, cut diagonally into 12 thin slices
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Andouille is a spicy Louisiana sausage. You may substitute any garlicky sausage.
1. Put a pizza stone on the lowest rack of the oven. Preheat to 400°F (If you use a metal pan instead, do not preheat the pan).
2. Combine the cheese and sour cream in a bowl.
3. Spread half the mixture to within 1/4 inch of the edge of 2 12-inch pizza shells.
4. Arrange 6 slices of the sausage atop each pizza.
5. Slide the pizzas onto the pizza stone.
6. Bake for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
